nodes.name: Poospiza
nodes.summary: Poospiza（Poospiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Slaty-backed hemispingus、Rufous-browed hemispingus、Bolivian warbling finch等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Slaty-backed hemispingus
nodes.summary: The slaty-backed hemispingus (Poospiza goeringi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae that is endemic to Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
